title: BIRD
description: Return the final answer for each BIRD dev natural-language-to-SQL item.
baseline_summary: A placeholder SQL solver that always returns SELECT 1.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher accuracy is better across independently evolved BIRD text-to-SQL question runs under official-style execution evaluation.

prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The entry symbol solve(question: dict) must return a SQL string for the current BIRD text-to-SQL item. The question context includes the official BIRD schema summary, evidence, and local database paths. The verifier is adapter-style: it extracts SQL text from the return value, executes both predicted SQL and gold SQL against the item's local BIRD SQLite database, and compares result sets using official-style execution evaluation semantics.
